title: Klaviyo vs Moosend (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Klaviyo and Moosend email marketing tools. See pricing, features, and which is best for your business.
intro: Both Klaviyo and Moosend are freemium email marketing platforms with strong automation capabilities, but they cater to different business types. Klaviyo excels for e-commerce brands needing deep integrations and predictive analytics, while Moosend offers exceptional value for small businesses seeking affordable, unlimited email sending. Understanding their strengths will help you choose the right tool for your marketing needs.
choose_a_if: You run an e-commerce store on Shopify or WooCommerce and need deep platform integrations
Predictive analytics and advanced segmentation are critical to your marketing strategy
You want SMS marketing and product reviews features built into one platform
choose_b_if: You're a small business with a limited budget and want to start at just $9/month
Unlimited email sending matters more to you than advanced e-commerce features
You value affordability and ease of use for beginners over specialized integrations

faq.a: It depends on your needs. Klaviyo is superior for e-commerce brands requiring advanced integrations and predictive analytics, while Moosend offers better overall value for small businesses and has higher customer satisfaction scores. Neither is universally 'better'—it's about fit.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Klaviyo or Moosend?
faq.a: Moosend is significantly cheaper, starting at $9/month compared to Klaviyo's $45/month. Moosend also offers 1,000 free subscribers versus Klaviyo's 500. For budget-conscious businesses, Moosend is the clear winner on pricing.

faq.q: Can I switch from Moosend to Klaviyo?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support contact list imports and exports, making migration possible. However, you'll need to manually recreate complex automation workflows, as they use different workflow builders. Plan for some setup time during the transition.
